examples.vote_description: Protecting Prudent Investment of Retirement Savings Act
examples.reason: Protecting Prudent Investment of Retirement Savings Act — despite the name, this ROLLS BACK the DOL ESG investing rule, restricting how pension funds (including union pension funds) can consider environmental and social factors when investing. Unions strongly opposed this bill.

examples.vote_description: Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act
examples.reason: Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act — allows schools to offer whole-fat milk and flavored milk, supported by the dairy industry and National Dairy Council as it increases school milk sales.

examples.vote_description: Making appropriations for Legislative Branch for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2022, and for other purposes
examples.reason: CHIPS and Science Act — massive investment in semiconductor manufacturing and scientific research. Major tech companies like Intel, TSMC, and Samsung directly benefit from chip manufacturing subsidies.

examples.vote_description: Full-Year Continuing Appropriations and Extensions Act, 2025
examples.reason: Amendment to reinstate veteran federal employees fired without cause — federal employee unions strongly support protections against arbitrary dismissal of federal workers.

examples.vote_description: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2024
examples.reason: FY2024 Agriculture Appropriations Act — funds USDA programs, crop insurance, farm subsidies, and food safety that the farm bureau and agricultural companies depend on.

highlights.issue: Universal background checks for gun purchases
Build a wall on the U.S.-Mexico border
Require permits to carry concealed guns
